profile.title: User Profile
profile.description: User profile with identification and API credentials

email.description: Unique email address of the user

apiKey.description: Secret, unique API key used for backend and external bot automation

balance.title: User Balance
balance.description: The current amount of AlphaCoin that the user owns

userId.description: Uniquely identifies the user owning this balance

amount.description: Target balance amount in AlphaCoin, starts at 100 as sign-on bonus

transaction.title: Transaction Log
transaction.description: A recorded transfer of AlphaCoin coins between players or systems

fromUserId.description: The sender's user ID. Null if minted as system reward.

reason.description: The purpose of transaction (e.g., Reward, Game purchase, Send)

/profiles/{profileId}.description: Stores credentials and system mapping of users

/transactions/{transactionId}.description: A ledger of points transfers across different users
